payload.message: Execute ops-heartbeat skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/heartbeat_state.json and proposals.json. Run heartbeat logic. Write results to those files. Do not call any heartbeat API or POST to Railway.

Execute mission-worker skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/steps.json, take one step, run it, append result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ops/completed/YYYY-MM-DD.json (today) and remove that step from steps.json. Do not call any step API or Railway.

Execute trend-hunter skill. Slot 9am, date today (Asia/Tokyo). Use this slot and today's date only. Get metrics, run trend search, write trends/ and hooks/ for slot 9am. Do not infer time; do not run date.

Execute trend-hunter skill. Slot 9pm, date today (Asia/Tokyo). Use this slot and today's date only. Get metrics, run trend search, write trends/ and hooks/ for slot 9pm. Do not infer time; do not run date.
Execute suffering-detector skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/suffering/findings_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.
Execute x-poster skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/hooks/YYYY-MM-DD.json for today, slot 9am. Post the 9am postText to X now.
Execute x-poster skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/hooks/YYYY-MM-DD.json for today, slot 9pm. Post the 9pm postText to X now.
Execute tiktok-poster skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/hooks/YYYY-MM-DD.json for today, slot 9am. Post the 9am caption and imageUrl to TikTok now.
Execute tiktok-poster skill. Read ~/.openclaw/workspace/hooks/YYYY-MM-DD.json for today, slot 9pm. Post the 9pm caption and imageUrl to TikTok now.
Execute app-nudge-sender skill. POST /api/admin/jobs/app-nudge-sender with slot: morning.
Execute app-nudge-sender skill. POST /api/admin/jobs/app-nudge-sender with slot: afternoon.
Execute app-nudge-sender skill. POST /api/admin/jobs/app-nudge-sender with slot: evening.
Execute moltbook-monitor skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/moltbook-monitor/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.
Execute moltbook-poster skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/moltbook-poster/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.
Execute roundtable-standup skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/roundtable-standup/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any API.
Execute roundtable-memory-extract skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/roundtable-memory-extract/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any API.
Execute roundtable-initiative-generate skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/roundtable-initiative-generate/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any API.
Execute hookpost-ttl-cleaner skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/hookpost-ttl-cleaner/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.
Execute sto-weekly-refresh skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/sto-weekly-refresh/run_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.
Execute autonomy-check skill. Write result to ~/.openclaw/workspace/autonomy-check/audit_YYYY-MM-DD.json (use today). Do not POST to any jobs API.

Execute daily-memory skill. Read /home/anicca/.openclaw/memory/anicca/AGENTS.md. Append today's learnings to /home/anicca/.openclaw/memory/anicca/lessons-learned.md. Write today's diary to /home/anicca/.openclaw/memory/anicca/diary-YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's date in YYYY-MM-DD).
